name: lopi
description: Multi-agent Claude Code orchestrator for Claude Desktop — submit tasks, watch agents run in isolated git branches, and see live stack status inline.

max_agents.title: Max concurrent agents
max_agents.description: Upper bound on how many agent tasks lopi runs at once.

default_repo.title: Default repo path
default_repo.description: Repository path used when a submitted task doesn't specify one.

claude_cli_path.title: Claude CLI path
claude_cli_path.description: Path to the `claude` binary lopi's agent runner invokes.
